reasoning: Focus on lactate clearance by targeting your limiter. Your last ride was on the easier side of intensity, indicating recovery. We're aiming to build fatigue resistance and an aerobic base for the challenging Cascade Springs segment of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders: alternate 2 min at 242-256W with 4 min at 201-218W, repeat for 5 sets. This helps with lactate clearance and builds fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to bring heart rate down

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
